title: US boards ship carrying Iran oil as Trump threatens mine-laying vessels
summary_full: Central Command said it has intercepted 33 vessels since imposing a blockade on ships coming to and from Iran.
summary_public: Central Command said it has intercepted 33 vessels since imposing a blockade on ships coming to and from Iran.

IR.label: negative
